effect_cn: 每当你需要使用或打出一张【闪】时，你可以进行一次判定。若判定结果为红色，视为你使用或打出了一张【闪】。
effect_en: Whenever you need to use or play a [Dodge], you may perform a Judgment. If the result is red (Hearts or Diamonds), it is treated as if you used or played a [Dodge].

faq.q_cn: 若判定结果为黑色，我还能从手牌打出【闪】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。判定失败不影响你正常打出【闪】。
faq.q_en: If the Judgment result is black, can I still play a [Dodge] from my hand?
faq.a_en: Yes. A failed Judgment does not prevent you from playing a [Dodge] from your hand normally.

faq.q_cn: 具有修改判定能力的武将技能可以影响【八卦阵】的判定吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。所有具备修改判定技能的武将都可以影响【八卦阵】的判定结果。
faq.q_en: Can judgment-altering general skills affect [Eight Trigrams Formation]'s Judgment?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any skill that modifies Judgment results can affect [Eight Trigrams Formation].

faq.q_cn: 装备了【青釭剑】的攻击者使用【杀】时，【八卦阵】的判定是否还能生效？
faq.a_cn: 不能。【青釭剑】令目标防具无效，因此【八卦阵】在此次【杀】中无法触发判定。
faq.q_en: If the attacker is equipped with [Qing Gang Sword], can [Eight Trigrams Formation]'s Judgment still activate?
faq.a_en: No. [Qing Gang Sword] Nullifies the target's armor, so [Eight Trigrams Formation] cannot trigger its Judgment for that [Kill].

faq.q_cn: 【八卦阵】可以响应【南蛮入侵】或【万箭齐发】需要的【闪】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。只要有效果要求你使用或打出【闪】，【八卦阵】均可触发判定。
faq.q_en: Can [Eight Trigrams Formation] respond to [Barbarians] or [Raining Arrows] when a [Dodge] is required?
faq.a_en: Yes. Whenever any effect requires you to use or play a [Dodge], [Eight Trigrams Formation] may trigger its Judgment.

effect_cn: 锁定技，当你受到伤害时，若伤害值大于1，则你将伤害值改为1；当你失去装备区里的【白银狮子】后，你回复1点体力。
effect_en: Locked: When you receive damage, if the damage value exceeds 1, reduce it to 1. When you lose [Silver Lion Helmet] from your Equipment Zone, you recover 1 HP.

faq.q_cn: 【青釭剑】可以无效【白银狮子】的减伤效果吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。【青釭剑】令目标防具无效，装备【青釭剑】的攻击者使用【杀】时，【白银狮子】的减伤锁定技在该次【杀】中无效，攻击者可以造成超过1点的伤害。
faq.q_en: Can [Qing Gang Sword] bypass [Silver Lion Helmet]'s damage reduction?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Qing Gang Sword] Nullifies the target's armor. When an attacker equipped with [Qing Gang Sword] uses [Kill], [Silver Lion Helmet]'s damage reduction is Nullified for that attack, allowing damage exceeding 1 to be dealt.

faq.q_cn: 使用【酒】强化的【杀】造成2点伤害时，【白银狮子】能将伤害减为1吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。只要最终伤害值大于1，【白银狮子】将其改为1，无论伤害来源如何。
faq.q_en: If a [Wine]-boosted [Kill] would deal 2 damage, does [Silver Lion Helmet] reduce it to 1?
faq.a_en: Yes. As long as the final damage value exceeds 1, [Silver Lion Helmet] reduces it to 1 regardless of the source.

faq.q_cn: 将新防具装入装备区替换【白银狮子】时，是否触发回复体力的效果？
faq.a_cn: 是的。【白银狮子】因被替换而离开装备区，触发回复1点体力的效果。
faq.q_en: If [Silver Lion Helmet] is replaced by equipping a new armor, does the HP recovery trigger?
faq.a_en: Yes. When [Silver Lion Helmet] is replaced by a new armor, you lose it from your Equipment Zone, which triggers the 1 HP recovery.

faq.q_cn: 【白银狮子】对武将技能造成的伤害也有效吗？
faq.a_cn: 有效。【白银狮子】对所有来源的伤害生效，只要伤害值大于1均减为1，不限于【杀】造成的伤害。
faq.q_en: Does [Silver Lion Helmet] apply to damage from general skills (not from [Kill])?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Silver Lion Helmet] applies to all sources of damage. Any damage exceeding 1, regardless of source, is reduced to 1.

effect_cn: 锁定技，当你成为【火攻】或火【杀】的目标时，取消之；若你是小势力角色，你不会被横置。
effect_en: Locked: When you become the target of [Incendiary] or a fire [Kill], you are Removed as the target. If you are a minor-faction character, your General Card cannot be placed in horizontal position.

faq.q_cn: 【朱雀羽扇】将普通【杀】转化为火【杀】后，【明光铠】能取消此目标吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。只要【杀】的属性在结算时为火属性，【明光铠】均可取消目标。
faq.q_en: If [Vermilion Bird Fan] converts a normal [Kill] into a fire [Kill], can [Radiant Plate] remove you as a target?
faq.a_en: Yes. As long as the [Kill] has the fire property at the time of resolution, [Radiant Plate] can remove you as a target.

faq.q_cn: 装备【青釭剑】的攻击者使用火【杀】时，【明光铠】还能生效吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。【明光铠】的取消效果发生在成为目标时，早于【青釭剑】令防具无效的结算时机，因此【明光铠】仍然有效。
faq.q_en: If the attacker is equipped with [Qing Gang Sword] and uses a fire [Kill], can [Radiant Plate] still activate?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Radiant Plate]'s target removal occurs at the moment of becoming a target, which is earlier in the resolution order than [Qing Gang Sword]'s armor-negation effect. Therefore [Radiant Plate] still applies.

faq.q_cn: 【明光铠】能防止武将技能造成的火焰伤害吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。【明光铠】只取消特定卡牌（【火攻】、火【杀】）的目标，不防止武将技能直接造成的火焰伤害。
faq.q_en: Does [Radiant Plate] protect against fire damage dealt directly by general skills?
faq.a_en: No. [Radiant Plate] only removes you as a target of [Incendiary] and fire [Kill]. It does not prevent fire damage dealt directly by general skills.

faq.q_cn: 小势力角色的「不被横置」效果在任何时候都生效吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。只要装备了【明光铠】且为小势力角色，一切令其横置的效果均无效。
faq.q_en: Does the 'cannot be placed in horizontal position' effect for minor-faction characters apply at all times while equipped?
faq.a_en: Yes. As long as [Radiant Plate] is equipped and the character is a minor-faction character, all effects that would place their General Card in horizontal position are Nullified.

effect_cn: 锁定技，黑色的【杀】对你无效。
effect_en: Locked: Black [Kill] cards are Nullified against you.

faq.q_cn: 【仁王盾】对黑色的雷【杀】是否有效？
faq.a_cn: 有效。只要【杀】的花色为黑色（黑桃或梅花），无论其属性（普通、雷、火），【仁王盾】均令其无效。
faq.q_en: Does [Vajra Shield] negate a black thunder [Kill]?
faq.a_en: Yes. As long as the [Kill] card is black (Spades or Clubs), it is Nullified regardless of its elemental type (normal, thunder, or fire).

faq.q_cn: 【青釭剑】能令【仁王盾】无效吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。【青釭剑】令目标防具无效，因此装备【青釭剑】的攻击者使用黑色【杀】时，【仁王盾】在该次攻击中无效。
faq.q_en: Can [Qing Gang Sword] negate [Vajra Shield]?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Qing Gang Sword] Nullifies the target's armor, so a black [Kill] will land normally when the attacker is equipped with [Qing Gang Sword].

faq.q_cn: 【仁王盾】对红色的【杀】是否有任何效果？
faq.a_cn: 没有。【仁王盾】只对黑色【杀】生效，红色【杀】正常结算。
faq.q_en: Does [Vajra Shield] have any effect on red [Kill] cards?
faq.a_en: No. [Vajra Shield] only affects black [Kill] cards. Red [Kill] cards resolve normally.

effect_cn: 锁定技，【南蛮入侵】、【万箭齐发】和普通【杀】对你无效；当你受到火焰伤害时，此伤害+1。
effect_en: Locked: [Barbarians], [Raining Arrows], and normal [Kill] cards are Nullified against you. When you receive fire damage, that damage is increased by 1.

faq.q_cn: 【藤甲】对雷【杀】和火【杀】是否有效？
faq.a_cn: 无效。【藤甲】只令普通【杀】无效，雷【杀】和火【杀】可以正常命中。此外，受到火焰伤害时伤害还会+1。
faq.q_en: Does [Rattan Armour] protect against thunder [Kill] or fire [Kill]?
faq.a_en: No. [Rattan Armour] only Nullifies normal (non-elemental) [Kill]. Thunder [Kill] and fire [Kill] land normally, and fire damage additionally increases by 1.

faq.q_cn: 【青釭剑】可以无效【藤甲】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。装备【青釭剑】的攻击者使用普通【杀】时，【藤甲】在该次攻击中无效，普通【杀】正常命中。
faq.q_en: Can [Qing Gang Sword] negate [Rattan Armour]?
faq.a_en: Yes. When an attacker equipped with [Qing Gang Sword] uses a normal [Kill], [Rattan Armour] is Nullified for that attack and the [Kill] lands normally.

faq.q_cn: 【藤甲】的火焰伤害+1是否叠加在原有伤害之上？
faq.a_cn: 是的。例如，受到1点火焰伤害时实际受到2点伤害；受到2点火焰伤害时实际受到3点伤害。
faq.q_en: Is the fire damage +1 from [Rattan Armour] added on top of the original damage?
faq.a_en: Yes. For example, 1 point of fire damage becomes 2; 2 points of fire damage becomes 3.

faq.q_cn: 铁索连环传导的火焰伤害是否也会触发【藤甲】的+1效果？
faq.a_cn: 是的。连环传导的伤害若为火焰属性，装备【藤甲】的角色受到的伤害+1。
faq.q_en: Does fire damage transmitted via [Iron Shackles] chain also trigger [Rattan Armour]'s +1 penalty?
faq.a_en: Yes. If chain-transmitted damage has the fire property, a character equipped with [Rattan Armour] takes +1 damage from it.

effect_cn: 锁定技，【杀】对你无效。
effect_en: Locked: [Kill] cards are Nullified against you.

effect_cn: 锁定技，当你成为【杀】或伤害类锦囊牌、黑色锦囊牌的目标后，若此牌目标数大于1，此牌对你无效。
effect_en: Locked: When you become the target of a [Kill], a damage-dealing Tool card, or a black Tool card, if that card has more than one target, that card is Nullified against you.

effect_cn: 锁定技，防止你受到的属性伤害。
effect_en: Locked: Prevent all elemental damage you receive.

effect_cn: 锁定技，其他角色不能对你使用普通锦囊牌。
effect_en: Locked: Other characters cannot use Non Time-Delay Tool cards on you.

effect_cn: 其他角色使用牌指定你为唯一目标后，你可以进行判定，若结果为红桃 ，此牌对你无效。
effect_en: After another character uses a card and designates you as the only target, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is Hearts, that card is Nullified against you.

effect_cn: 此牌不能被无视，该技能不能被无效：1.你可以将一张手牌当【闪】使用；2.当你受到【杀】造成的伤害时，你弃置装备区里的【烂银甲】。
effect_en: This card cannot be ignored and its effects cannot be Nullified: 1. You may use a hand card as a [Dodge]; 2. When you receive damage from a [Kill], discard [Tarnished Silver Armor] from your Equipment Zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以将手牌中的【护心镜】置入其他角色的装备区；当你受到致命伤害或大于1点的伤害时，你可以将装备区里的【护心镜】置入弃牌堆，然后防止此伤害。
effect_en: During your Action Phase, you may place [Sentinel Mirror] from your hand into another character's Equipment Zone. When you receive damage that would reduce your HP to 0 or below, or damage exceeding 1, you may place [Sentinel Mirror] from any Equipment Zone into the Discard Pile to prevent that damage.

faq.q_cn: 【护心镜】是锁定技吗？
faq.a_cn: 不是。【护心镜】是可选效果，你可以选择不发动。
faq.q_en: Is [Sentinel Mirror] a Locked skill?
faq.a_en: No. It is optional; you may choose not to activate it.

faq.q_cn: 体力值为1时受到1点伤害，是否可以发动【护心镜】？
faq.a_cn: 可以。1点伤害等于当前体力值1，满足触发条件。
faq.q_en: If my current HP is 1 and I receive 1 damage, can [Sentinel Mirror] activate?
faq.a_en: Yes. When your HP is 1, 1 point of damage would reduce it to 0 — that qualifies as damage that would reduce your HP to 0 or below, so the trigger condition is satisfied.

faq.q_cn: 发动【护心镜】将其置入弃牌堆，是否算作「弃置」？
faq.a_cn: 不算。【护心镜】是被「置入」弃牌堆，不属于弃置，因此不会触发依赖「弃置装备」的技能（如【枭姬】）。
faq.q_en: When [Sentinel Mirror] is placed into the Discard Pile upon activation, does it count as being 'discarded'?
faq.a_en: No. It is placed into the Discard Pile, which is distinct from being discarded. Skills that trigger on discarding equipment (such as [Qiao Ji]) are not activated.

faq.q_cn: 【护心镜】可以防止武将技能造成的伤害吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。只要伤害会使体力值降至0或以下，或伤害值大于1，无论伤害来源均可发动。
faq.q_en: Can [Sentinel Mirror] prevent damage from general skills?
faq.a_en: Yes. As long as the damage would reduce your HP to 0 or below, or the damage value exceeds 1, [Sentinel Mirror] can be activated regardless of the damage source.

effect_cn: 锁定技，体力为一点时，任何伤害对你无效。当你失去装备区里的【百花裙】时，你可以摸两张牌。
effect_en: Locked: When your HP Value is 1, all damage is Nullified against you. When you lose [Hundred Flowers Skirt] from your Equipment Zone, you may draw 2 cards.

effect_cn: 锁定技,你每次受到大于等于2点伤宫时,该伤害-1。
锁定技,武将牌不能被翻面。
effect_en: Locked: Whenever you receive damage of 2 or more, that damage is reduced by 1.
Locked: Your General Card cannot be flipped over.

effect_cn: 锁定技，属性伤害对你无效。
effect_en: Locked: Elemental damage is Nullified against you.

effect_cn: 锁定技，红色的【杀】对你无效，你的手牌上限+2。
effect_en: Locked: Red [Kill] cards are Nullified against you. Your Hand Limit is increased by 2.

effect_cn: 当有你成为【杀】的目标时，可丢弃1张手牌，转移给与你距离为1的角色。
effect_en: When you become the target of a [Kill], you may discard 1 hand card to redirect that [Kill] to a character at distance 1 from you.

effect_cn: 黑色的锦囊牌对你无效。
effect_en: Black Tool cards are Nullified against you.

effect_cn: 每当你受到伤害时，可选择攻击范围内的一名角色给你1张手牌，否则该角色减少1点体力。
effect_en: Whenever you receive damage, you may choose a character within your Attack Range. That character must give you 1 hand card, or they lose 1 HP.

effect_cn: 血量上限+1；主公无法装备，但可打出此牌，恢复1点血(不能进行濒死恢复)。
effect_en: Your Max HP is increased by 1. The Lord cannot equip this card, but may play it out to recover 1 HP (cannot be played out during a Verge of Death Resolution).

effect_cn: 锁定技,防止你受到的所有伤害，当你失去装备区的【混沌甲】时，你失去X点体力，X为【混沌甲】防止过的伤害次数。
effect_en: Locked: Prevent all damage you receive. When you lose [Primal Chaos Plate] from your Equipment Zone, you lose X HP, where X equals the number of times damage was prevented by this card.

effect_cn: 锁定技，每当你使用或打出【闪】后，对方受到你造成的1点伤害。
effect_en: Locked: After each time you use or play out a [Dodge], the attacker receives 1 damage dealt by you.

effect_cn: 锁定技，每当一名角色摸牌时，若此次摸牌数多于1，则将摸牌数改为1。
一名角色的准备阶段开始时，所有角色可以选择是否弃置一张牌，然后令此牌对其无效。
effect_en: Locked: Whenever a character draws cards, if they would draw more than 1, the number of cards drawn is reduced to 1.
At the start of a character's Starting Phase, each character may choose to discard 1 card to have [Ancient Paperweight]'s effect Nullified against them.
